creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Am 10/12/12 19:00, schrieb Mikhail T.:
> Thank you, Oliver. I just committed a fix for this particular problem --
> do let me know, if current's clang encounters anything else. The clang
> on my 9.x system is of version 3.1 and does no check for this warning
> condition. The lang/clang port also still installs only 3.1.
> 
> If your build succeeds, I'll close the PR. Yours,
> 
>    -mi
> 


Good day Mikhail.

I just have redone the updating and it seems the problems is gone.
Thanks you very much.

Regards,
Oliver
